task: Audit remaining user-visible Chinese across runtime modules and extension pages
notes: Top hotspots: shared/i18n.js, content/chatgpt-usage-monitor/main.js, options/options.js, multi-site quicknav clones.

task: Localize ChatGPT usage monitor UI and exported report strings
notes: Options usage panel, Export JSON, Export HTML, and the legacy monthly report title now follow localeMode and render in English when localeMode=en.

task: Localize remaining ChatGPT runtime modules with mixed Chinese text
notes: Patched explicit bilingual runtime copy in chatgpt-perf, quick deep search, mapping-client, and related status/toast paths so English mode no longer depends on fallback Chinese strings.

task: Localize remaining non-Genspark site UIs and shared QuickNav clones
notes: Real-browser coverage confirmed English QuickNav controls on Qwen, GLM, and DeepSeek; Genspark was intentionally excluded from testing per user request.

task: Run real-browser verification across key pages and supported sites
notes: Verified visible extension UI on options, popup, ChatGPT, Google Search, Qwen, GLM, and DeepSeek; exported usage files are now English. Gemini/Kimi/Grok home pages showed no visible injected nodes in this round, so those site-level UI paths remain not yet verified.

column7: Docs and build artifacts have been synced locally; waiting on final browser verification closure before marking the sweep done.
